title: Failure to build with non ansi port declarations

features.name: non-ANSI input port with same-name internal wire
features.description: Code should include a module with non-ANSI port declarations where an input port name matches an internal wire declaration

features.name: non-ANSI output port with same-name internal reg
features.description: Code should include a module with non-ANSI port declarations where an output port name matches an internal reg declaration

features.name: non-ANSI port declarations with same-name internal signals
features.description: Code should include a module with multiple non-ANSI port declarations where port names match corresponding internal wire/reg definitions
